name: gog
tagline: Popular ClawHub skill (941★): a CLI for Google Workspace — Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets and Docs.
verdict: Handles your own OAuth token locally and only talks to Google's APIs — no secret exfiltration. But it has no failure handling: if the binary is missing, you're unauthenticated, or a token expired, nothing tells you what to do, and it installs from an unpinned personal Homebrew tap.

highlights.summary: OAuth setup and every networked command can fail (missing binary, unauthenticated, expired token) with no failure handling.
Installs from an unpinned personal Homebrew tap (steipete/tap/gogcli).
Handles the user's own OAuth token locally and talks only to Google APIs — no secret exfiltration, harvesting, or unsolicited egress.
